gigapan.name: Aestetix and his face
gigapan.description:
Aestetix is a nifty guy.  He runs the 'Five Minutes of Fame' event at the Noisebridge Hacker space in San Francisco, and he does lots of fun things.

Whenever I see him he is smiling.  Of course, there is the selection effect that for the most part the only times I see him he also sees me, so the Scientist in me must argue for the null hypothesis that he only smiles when he sees me.

In any event...
